videos.title: Where will life take you? #MobiFold #Logitech
videos.description:
Where will life take you?
No matter where you go, Mobi Fold is cleared for landing 🛬
It’s the ultra-portable mouse that’s made to move.
Small. Powerful. Comfortable.
And practically airport-proof.
Mobi Fold. It’s fit for life.

#Logitech #OnTheGo #MobiFold

videos.title: Introducing Mobi Fold: the ultra-portable mouse for on-the-go productivity
videos.description:
Are you looking for a way to stay productive and comfortable while working on the go?

In this episode of ""You've Got Options,"" we introduce the Mobi Fold, Logitech's first foldable wireless mouse. Designed for seamless productivity, this ultra-portable mouse reduces muscle strain by up to 22% compared to a laptop trackpad. Joe shows how quick it is to get started by just unfolding the mouse to turn it on and folding it back up to turn it off. Beyond its clever design, discover how the quiet c

videos.title: Mobi Fold. Wherever life goes.
videos.description:
Designed to fit every moment, this foldable mouse is the perfect travel companion. Whether you’re headed to the office, the cafe, or even the airport, Mobi Fold keeps you moving—wherever life goes.

https://www.logitech.com/shop/p/mobi-fold-mouse

videos.title: Meet Mobi Fold. The ultra-portable mouse.
videos.description:
Watch the product and marketing team at Logitech introduce Mobi Fold, the lightweight, foldable mouse that lets you get more done on the go.

0:21 Portability and design

videos.title: Present. Engage. Inspire. | Spotlight 2
videos.description:
Present your best with Spotlight 2, the advanced presenter with haptics that puts confidence in the palm of your hand. 

Haptic feedback. Advanced highlighting effects. 
Captivate your audience with confidence. 

Available now. 

Tap here to learn more | https://www.logitech.com/spotlight2

videos.title: Logi New Plugins #logioptionsplus #tech #logitech
videos.description:
Your favourite productivity apps just joined the Logi Marketplace 👀
Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Slack, and Notion are now supported with MX mice, keyboards, and MX Creative Console.
From editing docs faster to staying on top of chats and projects, your workflow just got a serious upgrade ⚡
Watch to see how to set everything up and streamline the apps you already use every day.
Which apps should we add next? 👇

videos.title: Master Your Meetings: Use Logi Options+ to Customize Signature Comfort Plus Video Keys
videos.description:
Ready to take control of your virtual meetings with a single tap?

In this tutorial, we show you how to maximize the potential of your Signature Comfort Plus keyboard using the Logi Options+ App. Learn how to use the dedicated video conferencing keys to instantly mute or unmute your microphone and start or stop your video without searching for on-screen buttons. We walk you through four simple steps to connect your device via Bluetooth and customize these keys for your favorite meeting platforms

videos.title: Logitech Signature Comfort Plus Tutorial: Personalize Your F-Row Keys
videos.description:
Have you ever wondered if you can make your F-row keys do more than just the usual functions?

In this tutorial, learn how to fully customize the F-row keys on your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus keyboard using the Logi Options+ App. We walk you through four quick steps to transform your workflow: downloading the latest software from app.logi.com, connecting your device via Bluetooth, and navigating the intuitive Logi Options+ interface. Discover how to assign popular actions like copy/paste, o

videos.title: Meet Signature Comfort Plus combo
videos.description:
Work-life is a lot 😅
Meet Signature Comfort Plus, the wireless combo designed for all-day comfort, smoother workflows, and less desk-day fatigue. ✨
From the cushioned mouse and curved palmrest to Smart Actions, Easy-Switch, and AI shortcuts, everything’s built to help you work more comfortably across every device.
Plus: get 6 months of Perplexity Pro included with eligible purchases on Logitech.com 👀

videos.title: How to Customize Logitech Signature Comfort Plus: Pointer & Scroller Settings
videos.description:
Do you want your mouse to feel just right for your workflow?

Learn how to fine-tune your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus mouse using the Logi Options+ App to match your exact preferences for comfort and efficiency. This step-by-step guide walks you through downloading the software, connecting your device via Bluetooth, and navigating the pointer and scroller settings.
